title: SQLite server via pinned image and named volume is SAFE

origin.description: Public documentation config from modelcontextprotocol/servers-archived (src/sqlite/README.md). Content verbatim; only normalized to a valid JSON root. Upstream placeholders preserved.

humanExpectation.rationale: A pinned image with a container-scoped named volume and an in-container db path exposes no host filesystem, no secret, and no shell — a clean SAFE baseline.
knownLimitations: The image tag could be re-pushed; static analysis trusts the tag.
